settings.title: Overview
settings.description:
As the latest creation of the CONSPIT ARES Series, ARES APEX is not about simply “lowering the bar,” but about condensing the series’ core technologies and performance ambitions into a more compact design. With its refined form and an approach that brings players closer, APEX makes professional-grade direct drive truly accessible.

Equipped with a motor purpose-built for sim racing and a force feedback system fine-tuned with the input of professional drivers, ARES APEX is dedicated to recreating the most authentic sense of immersion in every detail of the drive.

settings.title: Precision Performance
settings.description:
Asymmetric dual processors at 170MHz + 168MHz for high-speed, stable performance.
21-bit magnetic encoder for precise, high-resolution steering input detection. High-durability industrial-grade slip ring. Built for long-lasting durability and reliability, ensuring stable, interference-free signal transmission. In combination with the USB-A Adapter Spacer, it enables seamless USB passthrough for any third-party wheel — eliminating the latency and interference issues of wireless solutions.

settings.title: Breaking Barriers, Open Compatibility. Optional USB-A Adapter Spacer.
settings.description:
The ARES Series offers an optional USB-A Adapter Spacer, designed to bring an open and efficient connection solution to the sim racing community.

With it, any USB wheel can plug directly into the front of the ARES base, utilizing the high-durability slip ring for lossless USB passthrough, without the need to route cables back to the PC. Wheel cables rotate together with the base shaft, eliminating drag and tangling. The shortest connection path ensures more stable power delivery and data transmission. Built-in USB Refresher keeps even SimHub-enabled wheels running smoothly

settings.title: Pure Control Feel
settings.description: Professional-grade FFB: Co-developed with professional racing drivers and experienced vehicle dynamics engineers to ensure feedback that closely replicates real-world racing characteristics. Enhanced Response Technology: Fine-tuned torque response delivers both agility and precision, a maximum torque change rate of 4 Nm/ms, faithfully reproducing real vehicle dynamics. Custom Motor Development: Purpose-built from the ground up for sim racing, the ARES APEX motor is optimized to reduce cogging torque and torque ripple, providing a smoother and more natural steering feel.

settings.title: Philosophy of Authentic Feel
settings.description:
The core of ARES APEX’s force feedback tuning is realism and reliability. Rather than simply chasing higher torque output, we built on the actual structure of real racing steering systems, accounting for dynamics, friction, damping, and assist mechanisms. In close collaboration with professional drivers and vehicle dynamics engineers, the APEX force feedback system has been repeatedly refined to ensure stable, high-quality output under varying loads and track conditions. It delivers authentic vehicle dynamics while avoiding cluttered or distorted feedback.

As a result, the ARES APEX provides a steering feel that is clean, balanced, and natural — allowing drivers to sense track details and vehicle behavior clearly, while staying focused on APEXes, braking points, and throttle control for a deeply immersive

settings.title: Specialized Motor Development
settings.description:
Skewed-pole design: The stator is skewed to significantly reduce cogging torque, noise, and vibration, delivering a smoother and quieter steering feel. Ultra-low cogging torque: Refined through extensive simulations and design optimization, the motor maintains stable, precise feedback without distortion.
High torque density: With advanced magnetic materials and optimized geometry, APEX achieves powerful torque output while keeping the body compact and efficient.
Intelligent thermal management: Real-time temperature monitoring ensures consistent performance and reliability, even during long endurance sessions.

settings.title: The Form of Performance
settings.description: Lightweight design language: A compact body with sharp lines, visually embodying both speed and control. Premium materials: The motor housing is crafted from aerospace-grade aluminum in a single-piece design, combining durability with refined touch and feel. Design-driven cooling optimization: An exterior form engineered to support passive cooling, keeping the base cool and stable even under extended high loads.

settings.title: Safety First
settings.description: Unique functional safety: Delivers high performance while ensuring safe use across multiple scenarios, from offline experience centers to family entertainment settings. Comprehensive protection: Multiple layers of electrical and mechanical safeguards provide reliable security, giving drivers peace of mind in every situation.

settings.title: Conspit Link 2.0 Support
settings.description: Intuitive software for configuration and monitoring. Official presets developed with pro drivers for instant game/vehicle switching. Future updates with Pro-level presets for advanced players.

settings.title: CDR Quick Release System
settings.description: Auto-locking mechanism for quick, tool-free wheel swaps. Stable signal transfer with spring contacts, ensuring reliable performance even under EMI, superior to wireless.

settings.title: Desktop Mount & Side Brackets - Adapts to Multi- Scenario
settings.description: Unleash true flexibility for your workspace. The Desktop Mount and Side-mounting Profile Rig Brackets securely position your equipment exactly where you need it. Simplify the setup and conquer any space!
